test: CCP validation circularity: does removal_type dimension drive the CCP/non-CCP separation?
method: Recompute archetype-level composite with removal_type weight zeroed, remaining weights renormalized
verdict: NOT CIRCULAR. 102% of CCP/non-CCP separation survives without removal_type. The gap is driven by additionality, permanence, and MRV — not by the removal_type dimension alone.
caveat: Test uses n=15 archetypes (12 CCP, 3 non-CCP), not the full 318-credit dataset. Archetype-level analysis may mask within-archetype variation.
